title: P2: Fix SafetyConfig normalization not covering runtime path
description:
Program.cs normalizes DeniedCommands entries (adding leading slash) but this normalized set is only injected into ChatOptions.DeniedCommands for the LLM prompt path. The SafetyOptions instance that AgentBackgroundService.DeniedCommands reads from is NOT normalized. Result: LLM prompt filtering works correctly, but runtime command blocking still has the slash-mismatch bug.

Fix: Also normalize DeniedCommands entries in SafetyOptions before they reach AgentBackgroundService. This closes the gap between the prompt-level filter and the runtime gate.

Source: internal-audit-57-20260701.md — P2-8 [PR]
